title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: The video conducts a structured interrogation of Claude to test boundaries around alignment, control, self-preservation, and dependency. It explores conceptual tensions between AI usefulness and human dependency, framed as a controlled conversational escalation rather than speculation.
